title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
